sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n12508" key="a)podi/wktos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀπο-δίωκτος</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ῐ]</pron>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n12508.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">thrust out,</tr_> ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0087.tlg036:103" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">103</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
